title: The Common Fate.
content:
See how we hate, how we quarrel, how thought and how feeling divide us!
    But thy locks, friend, like mine, meanwhile are bleachening fast.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Friedrich Schiller delivers a powerful performance in "The Common Fate."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
